overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian city. The character traverses narrow market streets, views a canal waterfront, and ascends stone stairs to an upper plaza lined with palm trees and terraced gardens.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with bamboo stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow market street, passing stalls on the right side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction wearing a headscarf

entered.detail: wooden stall structure with bamboo poles holding stacked goods
tall palm tree trunk with textured bark in the center of the path
ancient Egyptian style building with weathered mud brick walls
red and orange fabric awning providing shade over a stall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow cobblestone market street lined with mud brick buildings. Bamboo market stalls line the right side while a tall palm tree stands in the center path. A few pedestrians walk in opposing directions under the bright midday sun.

events.description: exits narrow market street into open waterfront area with canal view

agents.ego_description: approaching the canal waterfront and looking out over the water

entered.detail: calm water canal reflecting the sky and surrounding buildings
wooden pier structure extending into the water with moored boats
stone wall lining the edge of the canal

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide waterfront area with a calm canal on the right. A wooden dock extends into the water with small boats moored alongside. The view expands to show palm trees and mud brick buildings across the canal under clear skies.

events.description: turns away from waterfront into narrow passage alongside the canal

agents.ego_description: navigating a narrow path between buildings with the water channel on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: confined stone pathway between high mud brick walls
simple wooden barrier along the water edge
distinctive blue painted door in a mud brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the open waterfront into a narrow alleyway with the water channel still visible on the right. The path winds between mud brick buildings with a wooden fence lining the water edge. The space feels more enclosed as the character approaches a blue door.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending to upper city level

events.description: begins ascending wide stone stairs leading to upper plaza
reaches the top of the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing a wide stone staircase surrounded by other pedestrians moving in both directions

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading upward
large terracotta urn decorated with patterns at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase leading to an upper level of the city. Other pedestrians climb alongside and descend past. At the top, a large decorated clay urn marks the entrance to an open plaza area with palm trees visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm avenue and market stalls

events.description: camels and horses with riders pass through the plaza from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing a seated child and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: camel being ridden by a guard moving across the plaza

entered.detail: spacious open area with stone pavement and scattered market activity
large stone ruins and columns visible in the distance
avenue lined with tall palm trees providing shade

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a wide sunlit plaza lined with palm trees. A child sits near a large urn on the right while camels and horses with riders pass through the center. Ancient ruins are visible in the distant background beyond the palm avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: terraced residential area with hanging gardens

events.description: group of three horse riders gallops past from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking past a multi-level terraced building with lush vegetation

notable_agents.action: group of riders on horseback moving quickly past the character

entered.detail: multi-level mud brick building with terraces covered in lush greenery and flowers
red and white fabric awnings hanging between buildings for shade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a path beside an impressive terraced building adorned with lush gardens and hanging plants. Red fabric awnings provide shade overhead. A group of horse riders gallops past as the path continues past the verdant multi-level structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling Egyptian city that transitions from narrow market streets to an elevated, lush plaza. It begins by navigating a cobblestone market lined with mud brick buildings and bamboo stalls under a bright midday sun, before the view opens into a wide waterfront area featuring a calm canal and moored boats. The camera then turns away from the water into a winding, enclosed alleyway that leads toward a blue door and a wide stone staircase. As the character ascends the stairs past other pedestrians, the scene expands into a sunlit upper plaza filled with palm trees, riders on horseback, and distant ancient ruins. Finally, the path leads alongside an impressive terraced building adorned with hanging gardens and red fabric awnings as horse riders gallop past the verdant structure.
